title: Evaluate PPS-capable T-Echo revision
description: Evaluate LILYGO's response and any proposed existing-board access, rework, or custom T-Echo revision against LICHEN technical and commercial requirements. Do not order samples or authorize NRE under this Bead.
acceptance_criteria: Compare current-board test-pad/rework, stock future revision, and custom revision options; verify selected GPIO supports nRF52840 GPIOTE/PPI capture and does not conflict with radio, e-ink, USB, buttons, RTC, or low-power operation; record PPS/EXTINT/power electrical design, schematic openness, bootloader/board support, sample availability, NRE, MOQ, unit-price bands, lead time, lifecycle, regulatory impact, and support terms; produce proceed/request-changes/reject recommendation with explicit assumptions; any spend or commitment remains separately authorized.
